chin_falam.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Thil nganpi a um lo. Fieldwork nornmi, cinken tein dongh.
chin_falam.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Watershed cu hmun kip ah a dam cang. Headwaters cu a dai i a thiang. Mainstem nih nga a phawr ṭhan. Beaver wetlands nih floodplain rian an ṭuan. Timing le community an i pum tikah watershed-scale recovery cu hitin a langh.
chin_falam.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Components tampi cu an ṭha chin. A phara cu rian an herh rih. Trajectory a ṭha i community nih an i tel.
chin_falam.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Tei cheu, a fun cheu. Watershed work taktak cu a fanhpi in a i khat lo; a cheu cu an ṭha chin i a cheu cu an dinh.
chin_falam.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Quality laklaai cu a niam i components tlawmte lawng nih recovery thresholds an phanh. Stewardship nih pressures a zulh khawh lo tikah watershed cu hitin thanhngal tein a chiat.
chin_falam.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Initial conditions cu ṭuan khawh a lo. Year 1 cu citizen-science monitoring le cawnpiaknak caah hman, dam removal bantuk al i tuahmi ah na hman hlan ah community support serh nakhnga.
chin_falam.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Hi component caah zeidah na tuah khawh
chin_falam.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Watershed component in kum khat cio quality trend chart
chin_falam.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ AI watershed educator nih na watershed data a rel lio...
chin_falam.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Wabanaki mi a si lo, watershed coordinator asiloah hydrologist taktak a si lo, i Wabanaki nation, agency, asiloah organization zeihmanh caah bia a chim lo.
chin_falam.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Maine watershed work kong ah zumhawktlak mi aw hna caah, Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, le Maine Department of Environmental Protection hna he hal.
chin_falam.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Watershed components paruk, kum hra, Maine pressures taktak: dam barriers, agricultural runoff, suburban stormwater, climate nih a chuahtermi floods le droughts.
chin_falam.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Hydrological feedback rules nih an i pehtlaih.
chin_falam.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Buffers ṭha nih headwater streams a daisak. Beaver wetlands nih floods a tlaihthawh i mainstem a thianter. Ag runoff a tlawm nih tiva a thaw khawhter. A i pehtlaih i a hlim mi tiva hna nih salmon le alewife runs a phawr ṭhan.
chin_falam.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Kum 10 chung zeihmanh na tuah lo ahcun zeitindah a si lai?
chin_falam.what_changed_this_year: Hi kum ah zeidah a thleng
chin_falam.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: AI watershed educator kha na watershed data rel awkah hal
chin_falam.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: AI watershed-science educator nih atu na dinhmun a rel
chin_falam.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Hi kum ah actions a um rih lo. Component pakhat thim, technique pakhat thim.
chin_falam.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Condensation a tlawm — a lum tuk asiloah a ro tuk.
chin_falam.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Condensation a nual. Precipitation cinken nain a nem.
chin_falam.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Moisture a sang + temp a dai + lift a ngan → convective precipitation a ngan.
chin_falam.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Cloud moisture, temperature, le thli kha remh. Widget nih precipitation cu a phundang types pali chungah pakhat ah a chiah. Score a um lo, reveal a um lo — thlur i zoh.
chin_falam.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Hypothesis (free text): Zeidah storm le drizzle a chuahter?
chin_falam.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Na dinh — prompts a onghmi langhter
chin_falam.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Sliders pahnih kha ip tein tlaih. Pakhat kha ṭhen. Zoh.
chin_falam.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Type khat a chuahtermi settings pahnih hmuh.
chin_falam.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Storm taktak nih moisture le instability an pahnih an herh. Cazin.
chin_falam.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ka hngalh — namah bia in fianter
chin_falam.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Moisture, temperature, le thli nih precipitation type an i tonhter ning kha fianter.
chin_falam.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Design note: discrete 4-type precipitation marker; rainfall-rate score a um lo; reveal a um lo — by design.
chin_falam.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Water Cycle. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 in 6 tiang stage thim, J nih Journey mode a thleng, R U P nih na journey path a thim.
chin_falam.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Watershed Steward kum 10 campaign ah thleng
chin_falam.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: droplet pakhat kha rili in rili tiang zulh. Rili ah na thawk lai, evaporate, cloud ah kal, ruah bantuk in tla, cun leilei ah path pakhat thim (river runoff, underground infiltration, asiloah thingkung nih a in). Path pakhat cio nih caan a phundang an hman. Loop kha dih in journey log; loops 3 nih Journey badge a onghter.
chin_falam.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Water molecule KHAT kha a vialte na zulh — form a thleng (liquid → vapor → liquid) nain zeitikhmanh ah ser asiloah hrawh a si lo. Ti na dinmi paoh cu kum billions chungah cycle a i tuah cang.
chin_falam.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Water droplet ah cang i water cycle pumpi kha zulh! Stage pakhat cio ah thimnak tuah i transformation pakhat cio a hnu science kha cawn.
chin_falam.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Halnak pakhat hal (tahchunhnak, Zeicah clouds an len?)...
chin_falam.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Ti cu a herh lo — runoff + a lutmi ≈ leilei a phanmi ruah 100%. Zeihmanh a hlo lo; rili ah kirnak path a phundang lawng a hman.
